description: Structured Activities of Daily Living templates inspired by public ADL and smart-home activity-recognition research datasets. No personal or raw participant data is included.

categories.label: Meal preparation
categories.typical_context: Kitchen activity before breakfast, lunch, or dinner
safety_notes: avoid giving nutrition or medication advice beyond provided care plan

categories.label: Medication reminder
categories.typical_context: Medication schedule after meal or at prescribed time

categories.label: Mobility exercise
safety_notes: avoid intense activity for mobility-limited patients

categories.label: Hydration
safety_notes: respect clinician-specific fluid restrictions if present

categories.label: Social engagement
categories.typical_context: Call family member, attend group activity, or light conversation
safety_notes: do not simulate human relationships deceptively

public_dataset_references.name: DAMMI
public_dataset_references.focus: elderly daily activities, IoT sensors, smartphone, wristband, psychological daily reports
public_dataset_references.use_in_project: reference schema for daily activity streams and scenario design

public_dataset_references.name: CASAS smart home datasets
public_dataset_references.use_in_project: reference vocabulary for home activity event templates

public_dataset_references.name: LSC-ADL annotations
public_dataset_references.use_in_project: reference for activity labels and semantic retrieval demos
